hard_rule: Only files under 01_LOAD_TO_PLATFORM_PROGRAMME_DATA are programme payload files. Files under folders 02, 03, and 04 are control/reference/instruction material and must not be uploaded as programme records.

control_files.platform_update_map_CONTROL_ONLY.csv: Use only for matching each programme row to existing platform records.
control_files.merge_review_CONTROL_ONLY.csv: Use only for human-review routing and conflict checks.
control_files.platform_baseline_reference_DO_NOT_UPLOA: Existing platform export used as a reference only.
